Title: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
Key Patterns / Concepts: JSON-RPC over stdio, tools/list, tools/call, MCP resources, protocol-based tool sharing
Notes: Built in lesson 12. Maps to Brij's concept #02 (MCP).

Title: Reflection + Plan-and-Execute
Key Patterns / Concepts: Reflection / Reflexion, Plan-and-Execute, ReWOO, iterative refinement
Notes: Built in lesson 13. Maps to Brij's concept #01 (Agentic Loops — Reflect).

Title: Multi-agent + Long-term Memory
Key Patterns / Concepts: Supervisor pattern, Swarm pattern, semantic long-term memory, state sharing via LangGraph channels
Notes: Built in lesson 14. Maps to Brij's concept #03 (Subagents).

Title: Spec-Driven Development (SDD)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Spec-first workflow, structured intermediate artifacts, phase gates, acceptance criteria, HITL approval
Notes: Built in lesson 15. Generated wordcount.py demonstrates the pipeline end-to-end.

Title: Vibe Coding
Key Patterns / Concepts: Generate-execute-reflect-retry loop, sandboxed code execution, error-driven refinement, iteration budget
Notes: Improvisational opposite of SDD. The spectrum's other end.

Title: Skill Development (Claude Skills)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Skill manifests, triggering by description, bundled resources, skill composition, skill vs system-prompt trade-off

Title: Anthropic SDK / Claude Agent SDK
Key Patterns / Concepts: Raw messages.create API, tool_use / tool_result content blocks, Claude Agent SDK, LangChain vs SDK trade-offs
Notes: Build the same patterns without LangChain.

Title: AI Gateway (one control plane many models)
Key Patterns / Concepts: LiteLLM / OpenRouter / Vercel AI Gateway, provider routing, auth, rate-limit, retry, cost tracking, A/B model swap
Notes: NEW. Maps to Brij's concept #04 (AI Gateway).

Title: Files & Document AI (incl. multimodal RAG)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Native PDF input, vision input, Files API, Citations API, Batches API (50% discount on async), CLIP/ColPali unified multimodal embedding
Notes: Scope expanded — now covers BOTH Claude native multimodal AND unified-embedding multimodal RAG. Maps to Brij RAG #5.

Title: Custom LangGraph + HITL
Key Patterns / Concepts: StateGraph, conditional edges, interrupts, HITL approvals, time-travel debugging, subgraphs

Title: Hybrid RAG (dense + sparse + RRF)
Key Patterns / Concepts: BM25 sparse search via rank_bm25, dense + sparse fusion, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), keyword vs semantic match comparison
Notes: NEW. Maps to Brij RAG #1. 15-30% retrieval-quality improvement over dense-only on most corpora.

Title: GraphRAG (entity extraction + knowledge graph)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Entity + relationship extraction via structured output, NetworkX or Neo4j knowledge graph, subgraph retrieval, community summaries, hybrid chunk + graph retrieval
Notes: NEW. Maps to Brij RAG #2. High value for relationship-heavy data (legal/biomedical/orgcharts).

Title: Corrective RAG (CRAG)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Retrieval-grader LLM judge, query rewriter for ambiguous results, web-search fallback for incorrect retrieval, branching pipeline
Notes: NEW. Maps to Brij RAG #4. Extends safe_rag.py's pattern but on the retrieval side.

Title: Evaluation (Ragas + LangSmith)
Key Patterns / Concepts: Golden datasets, the four RAG metrics (faithfulness/answer-relevance/context-precision/context-recall), LangSmith tracing, regression testing for prompts
Notes: Measurable quality. Maps to Brij concept #06 (Evals).

Title: Cost Optimization
Key Patterns / Concepts: Model selection per role (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), cache hit-rate optimization, Batches API, prompt compression
Notes: Targets 5-10x cost reduction. Maps to Brij concept #05 (Inference Economics).

Title: Streaming + Web UI
Key Patterns / Concepts: Async LCEL (.ainvoke / .astream), Server-Sent Events, async LCEL throughout, per-request thread_id, backpressure

Title: Production Deployment + Observability
Key Patterns / Concepts: Containerization, deployment platforms (Fly.io, Vercel, Render), secrets, autoscaling, persistent backing stores, distributed tracing, cost dashboards
Notes: Real users on real hardware. Maps to Brij concept #08 (Observability).

Title: System Design Interview
Key Patterns / Concepts: Architect judgement, 5-phase interview structure (clarify-constrain-sketch-probe-iterate), trade-off analysis, AI-specific design questions

Title: Red-teaming & Compliance
Key Patterns / Concepts: Adversarial prompt injection at depth, PII at scale (Presidio), compliance frameworks (GDPR/HIPAA/SOC 2), audit trails, model cards
Notes: Hardening against real attacks. Reinforces Brij concept #07 (Guardrails).
